CreateExport.description: Grants permission to create an export

DeleteExport.description: Grants permission to delete an export

GetExecution.description: Grants permission to get the execution of an export

GetExport.description: Grants permission to get an export

GetTable.description: Grants permission to get the details of a table

ListExecutions.description: Grants permission to list all executions of an export

ListExports.description: Grants permission to list all exports

ListTables.description: Grants permission to list all available tables

ListTagsForResource.description: Grants permission to list tags for a resource

TagResource.description: Grants permission to tag a resource

UntagResource.description: Grants permission to untag a resource

UpdateExport.description: Grants permission to update an export

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the tags that are passed in the request

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the tags associated with the resource

aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access by the tag keys that are passed in the request
